meta.siteTitle: Mahdi Ahmadi – Tech Lead & Full-Stack Architect
meta.siteDescription: Tech Lead and Full-Stack Architect with an MSc in Bank Accounting and hands-on AT32/STM32 embedded firmware expertise. Building enterprise platforms at the intersection of finance, software, and silicon.

hero.name: Mahdi Ahmadi
hero.tagline: Tech Lead · Full-Stack Architect · MSc Bank Accounting
hero.description: At the intersection of high-stakes finance, enterprise software, and embedded silicon. I architect large-scale platforms armed with a Master's-level understanding of banking systems — and when the stack goes all the way down, I write bare-metal firmware for AT32/STM32 microcontrollers.

about.subTitle: About Me
about.title: Where Financial Depth Meets Engineering Precision.
about.description: I lead a team of 6 engineers building BEEWAZ — an e-commerce and CRM platform for the Iranian market. My Master's in Bank Accounting gives me a rare analytical edge when architecting financial systems, while my AT32/STM32 firmware experience means I can reason across the full stack: from database schema to MCU register maps.

services.subTitle: What I Offer
services.title: Enterprise-Grade Solutions, Delivered End-to-End
services.service1Text: Designing scalable, maintainable systems with Next.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL — from API design to deployment pipelines.
services.service2Text: Deep domain knowledge from an MSc in Bank Accounting, applied to building compliant, auditable financial software.
services.service3Text: Bare-metal and RTOS firmware for AT32 and STM32 microcontrollers — sensors, communication protocols, and IoT integration.
services.service4Text: Leading cross-functional teams of engineers, defining architecture standards, and accelerating delivery through clear technical vision.
services.service5Text: Building production-grade commerce infrastructure like BEEWAZ — multi-tenant, localized, and designed for the Iranian market.
services.service6Text: Implementing AI pipelines and intelligent automation into enterprise workflows and operational systems.

contact.subTitle: Get In Touch
contact.title: Let's Build Something Exceptional
contact.description: Have a complex problem or an ambitious project? I'd love to hear about it.
contact.subject: Subject

aboutPage.subTitle: My Story
aboutPage.title: Engineering at the Intersection of Finance, Code, and Hardware.
aboutPage.description: 13+ years of building systems where the cost of a bug isn't just a bad user experience — it's a failed transaction or a hardware fault. That pressure forged a rare combination: MSc-level financial reasoning, full-stack engineering, and firmware-level hardware expertise.
aboutPage.faqTitle: Have questions about working together? I have answers.

contactPage.subTitle: Let's Talk
contactPage.title: Start a Conversation About Your Next Project.
contactPage.description: Whether it's a FinTech platform, an enterprise system, or an embedded hardware project — reach out.
contactPage.subject: Subject

servicesPage.realSolutions: Real Engineering for Real Business Problems
servicesPage.description: From database schema to deployment pipeline, from banking logic to MCU firmware — I deliver complete solutions, not just code.
